But 1t speaks well for the industry
of the local body that Spokane is so
well advertised in the east. perhaps
the best advertised Of all of these
cities.


During the first six months OF the
year, ending July. 1. the chamber Of
commerce has replied to 1900 letters
and has mailed 10000 pieces Of liter
ature appertaining to the city and the
Inland Empire. In the same period
1t has compiled. printed and distrib-
uted 10000 pamphlets out of 100000.
The bulk Of these went to the east
ern and middle states and were scat
tered broadcast by the immigration
and passenger departments of the
railways.


Besides his other duties. Secretary
Levi G. Monroe has contributed spe-
cial articles. putting before the read
ing public in an interesting manner
data and information tending to draw
to Spokane factories, mills and other
Industries. and outlining the posi-
bilities of the surrounding country
In it's grain. fruit, stock and timber
lands. These contributions appear
in the Pacific Coast Merchant. Rand
McNally & Co.'S Railway Guide to the
Pacific Northwest. Opportunity of st
Paul. Business Opportunities Qssued
